headline: Wolfe shares 3 scenarios on how Iran war may play out
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research outlined three potential paths for the conflict in Iran in a note on Wednesday, highlighting deep uncertainty but noting that the most likely outcome is far from the worst-case scenario.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive Whitening Launch Tests Premium Growth Story And Valuation
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) has introduced its Optic White Pro Series Toothpaste, featuring dual whitening and ActivShine technologies. The product is designed to address deeper tooth stains at home and is being rolled out nationwide. The company highlights rapid and deep stain removal with no sensitivity, positioning the toothpaste within its premium oral care range. For investors watching NYSE:CL, this launch sits squarely in Colgate-Palmolive’s core oral care business, where brand...
